name: Sunset Projection Lamp
description: Warm amber light that turns your wall into a permanent sunset. Rotation adjusts the angle. USB powered. No bulb to replace. Just plug in and let the room change.

name: Bladeless Quiet Desk Fan
description: Moves air without moving sound. Bladeless design, touch controls, three speeds that all sound like silence. Keeps you cool without breaking the room.

name: 75% Mechanical Keyboard
description: Gasket-mounted. Pre-lubed switches. PBT keycaps that won't shine. The sound is deep, dampened, satisfying. This is the centerpiece of the desk.

name: Oversized Felt Desk Mat
description: 900 x 400mm of dark felt. Soft under your wrists. Quiet under your mouse. The base layer everything else sits on. Stitched edges that won't fray.

name: Wood Grain Aroma Diffuser
description: Ultrasonic mist with a warm LED glow. Wood grain shell that belongs on the desk, not hidden in a corner. Add any essential oil. The room gains a new dimension.

name: USB Mug Warmer
description: Ceramic heating surface. Wood base. USB powered from your monitor or laptop. Set your mug down and forget about it. It stays warm until you reach for it.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: Clips to the top of any monitor. Warm and cool toggle. Lights your desk without reflecting on screen. The only overhead light this room needs.
